title: Lead SEO Specialist at Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bewakoof Consulting Pvt Ltd!
